new_classes.label_de: Anderer Branntwein in Behältnissen mit mehr als 2 Litern (Unterposition 2208 90 77)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirits of subheading 2208 90 77: 'other' spirits of the type covered by subheading 2208 90 56 (i.e. spirits not elsewhere specified under heading 2208, such as those distilled from aniseed, raki, agave other than tequila, aromatic herbs/roots, sorghum or lees), presented in containers holding more than 2 litres.

coverage_explanation: The legal text for 22089077 reads simply "Other" and cross-references the explanatory note to subheading 22089056. Subheading 22089056 covers spirits not elsewhere specified under heading 2208 (e.g. aniseed-based, raki, agave other than tequila, aromatic herb/root, sorghum, lees spirits) in containers ≤ 2 L; 22089077 is its sibling covering the same product types but in containers > 2 L. The key distinguishing criteria captured are: (1) membership in SpiritsBeverages2208, (2) produced by OtherSpiritDistillationProcess22089056 (same process class as 22089056), and (3) packaged in a large container (> 2 L via eucn:LargeContainer). The restriction_type "complement" entry was included to indicate disjointness from the small-container sibling 22089056, but the OWL encoding of that as a complement restriction on BFO:has_part/SmallContainer would be more precise — that nuance is not perfectly captured here. Coverage is reduced because: (a) the full enumeration of specific spirit types (aniseed, raki, agave, herbal, sorghum, lees) is inherited by reference rather than re-asserted; (b) the "not elsewhere classified" residual nature of the subheading cannot be fully expressed in OWL-DL without a closed-world axiom. No regulatory individuals (measure types, footnotes) were referenced as none relevant are present in the running TBox for this specific subheading.
